data.title: Stock Market Today: Russell 2000 Leads As Market Claws Back Earlier Losses; Bank, Energy Stocks Up (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to a surge in oil prices. Despite posting strong earnings, Micron stock witnessed a significant drop. The stock market today saw the Russell 2000 leading the way as the market recovered from earlier losses, with bank and energy stocks showing increases. Live coverage of these market developments was provided, with a focus on the recovery and upward movement in stocks after the initial downturn. The fluctuations in stock prices and indices, along with the impact of rising oil prices, were notable aspects of the day's trading activities.

data.description: Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) based in Chicago, declared its quarterly dividends for common and preferred shares. For the first quarter of 2026, a regular common share dividend of $0.7025 per share was announced, payable on April 10, 2026, to shareholders listed on record by March 30, 2026. data.title: US Antimony Stock Climbs After Q4 Revenue Smashes Estimates
data.description: United States Antimony Corp. (NYSE: UAMY) saw its stock surge in after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report, which exceeded analyst revenue expectations. The company reported a quarterly loss of four cents per share, falling short of the predicted earnings of two cents per share. However, quarterly revenue came in at an impressive $39.26 million, surpassing analyst estimates by a significant 229.9%. In 2025, U.S. Antimony recorded a 219% increase in revenue, reaching $35.4 million compared to $11.1 million the previous year. For more details, you can find the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Planet Labs Stock Drives Higher After Q4 Beats Estimates
data.description: In after-hours trading on Thursday, shares of Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL ) surged following the release of their fourth-quarter earnings report. The company reported quarterly revenue of $86.82 million, exceeding the projected $78.53 million and showing growth from $61.55 million in the same period last year. Additionally, Planet Labs achieved a record annual revenue of $308 million. Details on their fiscal performance include an increase in RPOs and a promising outlook. Stay updated on the stock's movement to track the price action. For more information, access the full story on the situation at the stock on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Enzon Announces Extension of Exchange Offer Relating to Series C Non-Convertible Redeemable Preferred Stock
data.description: Enzon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has announced the extension of the expiration date for the exchange offer to holders of its Series C Non-Convertible Redeemable Preferred Stock. The offer allows holders to exchange their Series C Preferred Stock for shares of Enzon’s common stock. The new expiration date is set for March 24, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The original offer was extended to provide more time for participation in the exchange. This opportunity will now expire on the mentioned date unless further extension is granted.
